design_md:
# Stripe Landing Page Design

## At a glance
A premium, developer-first payments brand. Confident, technical, and minimal. The hero leans on a deep navy backdrop with vibrant indigo accents and crisp white type. Generous whitespace, sharp grid alignment, subtle motion.

## Color palette
- Primary: #635BFF (indigo) — CTAs, links, accent strokes
- Ink: #0A2540 (deep navy) — body backgrounds, headings
- Surface: #FFFFFF — cards, content surfaces
- Use 60/30/10 split: 60% surface, 30% ink, 10% indigo

## Typography
- Display: Sohne, 56–72px, tight tracking (-0.02em), weight 600
- Body: Camphor, 16–18px, 1.6 line-height, weight 400
- Mono accents for code samples in feature sections

## Sections
1. Hero — large headline + sub + dual CTA
2. Logo strip — social proof
3. Feature grid — 3 columns, icon + title + paragraph
4. Code sample — dark card, syntax highlighted
5. Testimonial — single quote, large type
6. Pricing teaser — two cards
7. CTA band — indigo background
8. Footer — minimal links
